title: T-036 — Schema-driven column draft/publish Server Action with schema_version bump + migration record
prompt:
# T-036 — Schema-driven column draft/publish Server Action with schema_version bump + migration record

PRD: `00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §6
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`

## Goal
Server Action `upsertDeptColumnDraft(input)` + `publishDeptColumnDraft(draftId)` that backs the §6 Admin UI wizard. Foundation primitive only — UI consumes it in T-037/T-038. Create writes to a `dept_column_drafts` table; publish promotes the draft to `Reference.DeptColumns`, bumps `schema_version`, and inserts a `schema_migrations` record.

## Implementation contract
(1) Migration 011-dept-column-drafts.sql: dept_column_drafts(id UUID, tenant_id UUID, dept_id UUID, column_key TEXT, field_type TEXT CHECK IN ('string','number','date','enum','formula','relation'), validation_json JSONB, presentation_json JSONB, status TEXT CHECK IN ('draft','published'), created_by UUID, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ); schema_migrations(id BIGSERIAL, tenant_id, dept_column_id UUID, prev_version INT, new_version INT, applied_at TIMESTAMPTZ). (2) packages/schema-driven/src/actions/draft.ts: upsertDeptColumnDraft + publishDeptColumnDraft Server Actions in apps/web/app/(settings)/schema/_actions/draft.ts. (3) Publish wraps everything in a single Drizzle transaction: insert into Reference.DeptColumns, bump schema_version, write schema_migrations row, emit outbox 'audit.recorded' with retention_class='operational' (T-009/T-018 contract). (4) Vitest unit test covers happy path + AC-3 idempotency.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/011-dept-column-drafts.sql [create]
- packages/schema-driven/src/actions/draft.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(settings)/schema/_actions/draft.ts [create]
- packages/schema-driven/src/__tests__/draft.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a tenant Schema Admin calls upsertDeptColumnDraft with field_type='enum' + validation rules, when the action returns, then a dept_column_drafts row exists with status='draft' and validation_json matches the input
2. Given a draft row with status='draft', when publishDeptColumnDraft runs, then a Reference.DeptColumns row is created/updated, schema_version is bumped by exactly 1, a schema_migrations row is appended, and the draft status flips to 'published' — all in one transaction
3. Given publishDeptColumnDraft is called twice for the same draftId, when the second call runs, then it returns idempotently (no second schema_version bump, no duplicate schema_migrations row)
4. Given the caller is not in role org.schema.admin, when either action is invoked, then it returns 403 and writes audit_events with retention_class='security'

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/schema-driven/src/__tests__/draft.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs before draft.ts exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/schema-driven test'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bump schema_version outside the publish transaction — drift detection (T-034) depends on atomicity
- Do not skip the RBAC guard — Schema Admin SoD split is locked in T-014
- Do not write directly to Reference.DeptColumns from upsertDeptColumnDraft (drafts only)

## Dependencies (must be complete first)
- T-014
- T-017

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED test before implementation) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Backend primitives for the §6 Admin UI wizard (draft/publish Server Actions + schema_version bump + migration record).
pipeline_inputs.details: Foundation backs the wizard primitive; the actual multi-step UI lives in T-037 and is wired E2E in T-038. Today there is no draft staging table — every change to Reference.DeptColumns must be transactional with a migration record per §6 'schema versioning'.

Do not introduce business logic from later module PRDs (01-NPD, 02-SETTINGS, etc.)
No UI components — covered by T-037
No automatic DDL execution — column is L3 metadata, ext_jsonb is the storage path
